subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and thine intent became clear and evident. If the pen of this servant hath fallen short in writing
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و مقصود ظاهر و پدید گشت اگر خامه این عبد در نگارش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
